name: bing-bang-project-spinup
description: Bing Bang's project launch system: when a proposal is accepted in Bonsai, spin up the Bonsai project + tasks, distribute the sold hours across the tasks at the standard blended rate, build the Google Drive folder (incl. _Client Services), and drop a pre-filled creative brief linked in the project overview. Never notifies the client and asks before assigning people. Includes a full step-by-step runbook so anyone on the team can run the whole pipeline.
